title: ionidium enneaspermum
intro: Ionidium enneaspermum, also known as Chinese false parsley, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Saxifragaceae family. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ionidium enneaspermum include reducing fever, alleviating cough and bronchitis, and treating various types of infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of dried flowers, roots, or leaves, which can be made into teas, decoctions, or infusions for medicinal purposes.
